[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000001 1
6 100000000 1
7 000000000 a

01 000010001 2
12 100000100 2
23 000100010 2
34 000011100 3
45 001000000 1
56 110101100 5
67 000010000 1
70 010101000 3

35 001000000 1
